ServicesPage.title: Services
ServicesPage.subtitle: Three ways to work together, from AI prototypes to full-stack products, through upskilling your teams.

ia.title: AI & Automation
ia.description: AI solutions (chatbots, agents, RAG, MCP, LLM integrations) that automate your repetitive tasks and make your business processes more reliable. From scoping to production.
bullets: Scoped, measurable use case before any prototype
POC delivered quickly, then industrialized for production
Integrated into your existing tools (CRM, API, internal tools...)
AI Act and GDPR compliant by design

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Development
fullstack.description: Web apps and APIs built to last, delivered on time and easy to evolve. Enterprise-grade rigor applied to a modern, productive stack.
bullets: Technical scoping before any code (architecture and stack tailored to your context)
Fast and accessible interfaces, clean and documented APIs
Structured data that grows with your business
Tested code that limits regressions across updates
Deployment, monitoring and alerting in production

formation.title: AI Training for Companies
formation.description: Hands-on generative AI training for your teams, across 3 levels tailored to your business context. Short or in-depth formats, onsite or remote.
bullets: Discovery (business teams): LLMs, AI agents, effective prompts, building a first agent
Developer: coding with Claude Code (sub-agents, skills, hooks) / first automation workflows (n8n)
Expert: advanced multi-agent architectures, the system that builds the system (requires existing fluency with Claude Code, Pi Agent or similar tools)

AboutPage.title: About

hero.headline: Thibaud Geisler - AI & Full-Stack Development
hero.tagline: I design AI products and custom web apps, in small teams or solo, with a business-solution mindset.

bio.intro: Full-stack developer specialized in AI and automation. I work as a freelancer with companies from small businesses to large groups, delivering concrete, measurable and maintainable products. Based between France and Luxembourg, I work remotely or hybrid.
bio.positioning: My positioning: AI in service of a precise business use case, not a gimmick. I combine LLMs, automations and full-stack development to deliver the simplest solution that actually solves the problem.
bio.approach: My approach: scope the real need with you, prototype fast, iterate on concrete deliverables, document for maintenance. I work in short milestones to ship regularly and adapt to your feedback.

AboutPage.transition: AI moves fast. I watch continuously, I test, and I bring into your projects what holds up in production.

header.tagline: Let's talk about your AI project, your custom application or a training session for your team.
